emails.subject: Confirmation on Master Dates
emails.body: Confirmation on Master Dates Tana, Can you please confirm for me what the financial master agreement dates are for Utilicorp United Inc (GCP shows 6-21-00) and Dynegy Canada Inc (GCP shows 6-16-95)? Canada currently has several confirmations that are being held until we can resolve what the dates are. Bernice

emails.subject: Re: Confirmation on Master Dates
emails.body: Re: Confirmation on Master Dates Do you have access to the Financial Trading Agreement database, where you can look these dates up? Bernice Rodriguez 07/24/2000 05:31 PM

emails.subject: Re: Confirmation on Master Dates
emails.body: I do not have access to the dbase..is it an option when submitting a SRRS request?! GCP await the hard copy of the executed/under negotiation report to confirm master dates. We also rely on the daily emails from Susan that indicate when a new master has been signed. However, in these two cases, Peggy H in Canada is thinking the dates are different from what was originally setup. Bernice From: Tana Jones on 07/25/2000 09:35 AM
